proposed_claim_kr: 본 설계는 Holter형 장시간 ECG를 위한 다중 시간축 SNN-inspired 4-class 분류 accelerator IP이다
proposed_claim_en: The design is a Holter-oriented long-window multi-timescale SNN-inspired four-class classification accelerator IP
limitations: Holter-oriented and SNN-inspired are architectural descriptions, not clinical certification or deep-SNN claims

proposed_claim_kr: 디지털 인터페이스는 1 kSPS signed 12-bit two's-complement ECG stream을 사용한다
proposed_claim_en: The digital interface uses a 1 kSPS signed 12-bit two's-complement ECG stream
limitations: stream convention, not accelerator throughput

proposed_claim_kr: 60초 Snapshot Readout과 30개 Snapshot의 Final Membrane 누적을 결합한다
proposed_claim_en: The architecture combines a 60-second Snapshot Readout with Final Membrane accumulation over 30 snapshots
limitations: one final decision corresponds to the configured 30-minute window

proposed_claim_kr: locked final-test 30분 chunk 정확도는 29/36=80.56%이다
proposed_claim_en: Locked final-test 30-minute chunk accuracy is 29/36=80.56%
limitations: public-dataset engineering result; database-class confounding remains

proposed_claim_kr: final-test record-majority 정확도는 16/19=84.21%이다
proposed_claim_en: Final-test record-majority accuracy is 16/19=84.21%
scope: 19 source records aggregated from the same final-test partition
limitations: not an independent test set

proposed_claim_kr: validation 32/32는 model-selection 결과이다
proposed_claim_en: Validation 32/32 is a model-selection result
limitations: must never be stated as final generalization accuracy

proposed_claim_kr: final test는 모델 선택에 사용되지 않았고 lock 후 1회 평가되었다
proposed_claim_en: The final test was not used for selection and was evaluated once after lock
limitations: repository-declared and artifact-traceable protocol

proposed_claim_kr: pure RTL 구현은 LUT 9719 FF 5038 BRAM 0 DSP 0을 사용한다
proposed_claim_en: The pure RTL implementation uses 9719 LUTs 5038 FFs 0 BRAM and 0 DSP
limitations: device/tool/configuration specific; not a speed or energy benchmark

proposed_claim_kr: pure RTL 구현의 WNS는 8.184 ns이다
proposed_claim_en: The pure RTL implementation has WNS of 8.184 ns
limitations: timing closure evidence, not processing latency

proposed_claim_kr: MicroBlaze full-replay system은 LUT 12494 FF 8494 BRAM 16 DSP 3이며 setup WNS는 0.097 ns이다
proposed_claim_en: The MicroBlaze full-replay system uses 12494 LUTs 8494 registers 16 BRAM and 3 DSP with 0.097 ns setup WNS
limitations: not pure accelerator resource and not board latency

proposed_claim_kr: board replay final_pred와 final_mem은 각각 36/36 일치했다
proposed_claim_en: Board replay final_pred and final_mem each matched 36/36 cases
scope: FPGA replay vs XSim expected outputs
limitations: functional equivalence only; label accuracy remains 29/36

proposed_claim_kr: AFE-generated final-test 입력은 board-replay 입력과 SHA256 36/36 동일하다
proposed_claim_en: AFE-generated final-test inputs are SHA256-identical to board-replay inputs for 36/36 chunks
limitations: byte identity only; does not prove classification correctness

proposed_claim_kr: canonical sample_gap_cycles=2에서 AFE-to-RTL final_pred와 final_mem은 36/36 bit-exact이다
proposed_claim_en: At canonical sample_gap_cycles=2 AFE-to-RTL final_pred and final_mem are bit-exact for 36/36 chunks
limitations: noncanonical fast debug cadence is excluded; equivalence is not accuracy

proposed_claim_kr: emu-XMODEL 36세그먼트 평균 RMS 차이는 1.95 LSB이고 lag는 0이다
proposed_claim_en: The mean emulator-to-XMODEL RMS difference over 36 segments is 1.95 LSB with zero lag
limitations: model-to-model agreement; local QRS slope deviations remain

proposed_claim_kr: 대표 NSR CHF ARR AFF nominal MATLAB record의 clipping ratio는 모두 0%이다
proposed_claim_en: Representative NSR CHF ARR AFF nominal MATLAB records all have 0% clipping
limitations: not all records and not physical measurement

proposed_claim_kr: strict source-record-wise split은 동일 source record의 partition 중복을 방지한다
proposed_claim_en: Strict source-record-wise splitting prevents the same source record from crossing partitions
limitations: does not eliminate database-to-class confounding

proposed_claim_kr: record leakage 방지와 database-class confounding 해소는 같은 것이 아니다
proposed_claim_en: Preventing record leakage is not the same as eliminating database-class confounding
limitations: requires same-acquisition or cross-domain validation in future

proposed_claim_kr: latency throughput speedup power energy 결론은 외부 benchmark 완료 후에만 가져온다
proposed_claim_en: Latency throughput speedup power and energy conclusions are imported only after the external benchmark is complete
limitations: all benchmark fields currently null

proposed_claim_kr: 본 결과는 임상적으로 검증된 진단이다
proposed_claim_en: These results constitute clinically validated diagnosis
limitations: no clinical cohort or medical-device validation

proposed_claim_kr: physical AFE PCB ADC silicon 또는 fabricated SoC를 검증했다
proposed_claim_en: A physical AFE PCB ADC silicon or fabricated SoC was validated
limitations: only MATLAB and XMODEL model-based analog evidence exists

proposed_claim_kr: board equivalence 36/36이므로 분류 정확도는 100%이다
proposed_claim_en: Classification accuracy is 100% because board equivalence is 36/36
limitations: board equivalence is 36/36 while label accuracy is 29/36

proposed_claim_kr: 상용 wearable medical product보다 임상적으로 우수하다
proposed_claim_en: The design is clinically superior to commercial wearable medical products
limitations: evaluation conditions and intended use are not comparable

proposed_claim_kr: 본 pure RTL accelerator는 1,800,000-sample 전체 raw input window를 저장하지 않고 sample-by-sample 방식으로 고정 크기 event/state와 Final Membrane을 갱신한다
proposed_claim_en: The pure RTL accelerator updates fixed-size event/state and Final Membrane sample by sample without storing the complete 1800000-sample raw input window
limitations: does not quantify exact inference-state total or MicroBlaze runtime memory; avoided full raw-input window storage is 2700000 decimal bytes
